items.title:
[正面] [h3]Del EOS al Peak[/h3]
Morimens que no lo conoc...
items.summary:
[h3]Del EOS al Peak[/h3]
Morimens que no lo conocía ni su madre hasta que llegó la collab de [b]Saya no Uta[/b], que es por la que lo descargué, y su historia en una palabra es [u]extraña[/u] pero única, con personajes grises y plotwist en todos los capítulos.
Y sí, si igual viniste por Saya, la historia es corta pero buena. 
 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5csUC3QMF1M

items.title: [正面] First and only Gacha style game I’ve ever played....
items.summary: First and only Gacha style game I’ve ever played. I just wanted to try out a game similar Slay the Spire and now I’ve spent $100+ with plans to drop another $100 before end of summer. I don’t even know what happened but don’t play this game. Sure it’s fun and all and you can play it F2P completely but something about this game just pulls the money out of my pocket.

items.title: [正面] In the ocean of soulless and suit controlled gacha...
items.summary:
In the ocean of soulless and suit controlled gachas, there is one gem called Morimens. 
Great story, great characters, amazing art direction, a unique theme in the space, and devs full of love and passion for their game. 
Today marks my 1 year anniversary of playing Morimens, I am very glad I decided to give this game a chance, and I can't recommend it enough. 
May the Silver Key guide you onto Mythag grounds.
